title: Cagliari, Sardinia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Cagliari is a city in Sardinia with a population of 149,000. Sardinia’s vibrant capital, with a stunning medieval quarter, white sand beaches nearby, and a unique island culture all its own.
